config.dataSetApi: select count(*) as visit        	   ,count(distinct(ip)) as ip        	   ,DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as tian        	   ,DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') as type        	   from sys_log          where log_type = 1 and create_time <= sysdate() and create_time >= (select date_sub(curdate(),interval 7 day))         group by tian,type         order by tian desc
